basic_details.job_title: UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research (UGC DAE CSR) SCIENTIST-D Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website https://www.ugc-dae.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification are eligible to apply for this SCIENTIST-D vacancy. The online application process for UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D Recruitment 2026 has started on 11 May 2026 and will remain open until 05 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UGC DAE CSR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D posts is 05 June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for the SCIENTIST-D post?
faq.answer: The SCIENTIST-D position is offered at Level-11 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC). This indicates a competitive salary structure for the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the SCIENTIST-D post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the SCIENTIST-D post in the UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the UGC DAE CSR located?
faq.answer: The UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with a pincode of 452001.

faq.question: Q6. When did the online application portal open?
faq.answer: The online application portal for the UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D recruitment opened on 11 May 2026. Candidates can start applying from this date.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees mentioned?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no specific application fee details are mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The SCIENTIST-D position is a full-time role, offering a stable career opportunity within the UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this UGC DAE CSR SCIENTIST-D recruitment is 07-2026. This number should be used for all future references.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is exclusively online. Offline applications will not be accepted. Please use the provided online links to apply.
